parameters.name: body
parameters.value: ={{ JSON.stringify({ model: 'gpt-4o-mini', messages: [{ role: 'user', content: 'Repurpose this content for 5 platforms. Return JSON with keys: twitter_thread (array of 3-5 tweets max 280 chars each), linkedin_post (professional tone, 1300 chars max), instagram_caption (casual, 30 hashtags), email_subject (5 options), blog_outline (5 section headers). Content: ' + $json.content })}] }) }}

meta.description: Feed 1 piece of content → AI repurposes into Twitter thread, LinkedIn post, Instagram caption, email subjects, blog outline → saves to Google Sheets content calendar
